mapper.select: SELECT * FROM record WHERE openid = #{openid} and check_date=#{checkDate}
mapper.insert: insert into record(openid, lab_id, check_date, checkin_time, checkout_time, checkin_loc, checkout_loc, status) values (#{openid},#{labId},#{checkDate},#{checkinTime},#{checkoutTime},#{checkinLocation},#{checkoutLocation},#{status})
mapper.select: select COUNT(*) from record where lab_id=#{labId} and check_date=#{checkDate}
